titleStmt.title: SII 27.226: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 226. (A.R. No. 338 of 1930-31.) SUJĒRU, MANGALORE TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Stone set up in a field.

This record registers a royal gift of land to god Timirēśvara, on the occasion when rains set in as a result of prayer during the period of famine. It states that the king was giving audience in the hall (mokaśāle) called Bhuvanāśraya of his palace (hiriya-aramane) at rājadhāni Maṅgalāpura.
The inscription is dated Śaka 1228, Viśvavasu, Siṁha 18, Sunday corresponding to 1305 A.D., August 15. The Śaka year was current.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīmatu pāṁḍyacakravarti rāya
gajāṁkusa baṁkidēvāḷupēṁdra dēvara vijayarājyamuttarōttarābhi
vriddhipravarddhamāna mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ duṣṭanigraha śiṣṭapratipāḷaka rā
gi sukhasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamirddu sakanṛpakālātīta saṁvatsara
doḷu 1228 ne viśvāvasu saṁvatsarada siṁhamāsa 18 ne Ā śrīmaturājadhāni maṁgaḷāpurada
hiriyaramaneya bhuvanāśrayada moka sāleyalu voḍḍōlagaṁ goṭṭiralu timirēśvaradēva
rige śrīmadarasaru Anāvṛṣṭiyalu harasikoṁḍu maḷeyakoṭṭadakke geyda dharmakāryya rā
jaralu muttuḍasuggi bidekāru mū 2 tiḷa 2 tāḷe ma bide kā
ru mū 2 tiḷa 2 maruḷupāḍi bidekāru mū 3 kaṇaṁjaṁbeṭṭu bide kā
ru mū 2 Aṁtu bidekāru mū 17 ragēṇi bitta mū 43 ke śrīmadarasaru koḍatidda ma 4
saluta Eṁdu kuḍuti yihāneyalu dēvarige naḍasuva nivēdya Akki kā 1 ku 1 nū naḍasi bāḷu
vudu Ī dharmmakāryyakkāvanorbbaṁ vakrastanāgi baṁdātaṁge śrī vāraṇāsiyalu sāvirakavi
leya vadhsida pāpa Arasiṁge daṁḍaga 1000 voṁdu taleyeṁdu dharmmakāryyava māḍi barasi nili
si koṭṭa śrīmadarasarige maṁgaḷamahāśrī
Digital edition of SII 27.226 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
